instruction.title: Landing Page Storytelling & Narrative Flow
instruction.overview: This document defines the structural narrative flow of the landing page, mapping user psychology states (Stripe/Linear style) to content sections.

step.question: What is this?
step.psychology: Capture curiosity within 3 seconds; show technical credibility.
step.headline: Automate data pipelines. No glue code.
step.description: Connect, configure, and monitor automated pipelines without writing custom ETL scripts or manual schema mappings.
step.actions: Primary: "Build Free Pipeline" (Forsythia) | Secondary: "View API Docs" (Outline)
step.friction_reducer: No credit card required. SOC2 compliant.
step.cockpit_visualization: CSS-only pipeline showing Source Database → Schema Mapper → Validation Engine → Data Warehouse with live metric pills (Latency: 23ms, Records: 50M+, Status: ● Live).
step.layout: Split layout on desktop (Left: 55% text, Right: 45% cockpit), single column stack on mobile.

step.question: Why do I need it?
step.psychology: Empathy mapping. Validate the user's ETL pain points.
step.headline: Still writing custom ETL scripts?

pain_points.point: Manual schema mappings fail under scale.
Broken APIs require constant pipeline maintenance.
Glue code eats up platform engineering cycles.

step.question: How does it fix it?
step.psychology: Relief. Break down the platform mechanics in steps.

step.question: What is the core engine?
step.showcase: CSV -> Schema Detection -> Validation -> Database Warehouse
Realtime streams -> 0ms disk cache -> Instant writing

step.question: What else can it do?
step.psychology: Establish security, scale, and observability confidence. CSS grid on desktop (≥ 768px), accordion on mobile (< 768px). State persists on resize.

step.question: Does it integrate with my stack?
step.connectors: Snowflake, PostgreSQL, BigQuery, AWS S3, Docker

step.question: What is the DX?
step.psychology: Control and flexibility. Demonstrate API/CLI access.
step.content: REST API commands, SDK snippets, configuration file preview.

step.question: Why should I trust you?
step.quote: "Reduced ETL setup from 2 days to 20 minutes."
"Auto-sync handles 50M records with zero pipeline downtime."

step.question: What does it cost?
step.psychology: Clear value segments. Free vs Pro vs Enterprise.

step.question: What if I have concerns?
step.psychology: Objection handling via structured Q&A accordion panels.
step.items: Free tier details, data security/SOC2, migration support, cancellation policy, enterprise features, integration limits, uptime guarantees.

step.question: How do I start?
step.psychology: Frictionless entry. Clear value proposition with trust indicators.
step.prompt: Build your first automated workflow in under five minutes.
step.reduces: No credit card required. SOC2 compliant.
step.trust_badges: SOC2 Certified (lock), SSO Ready (shield), Audit Logs (clipboard), 99.99% Uptime (clock), 50M+ Records Synced (database)

step.question: Where is the rest?
step.psychology: Professional completeness and easy legal/nav directory access.
step.content: Links categorizing legal, product, resources, and credentials.
